overview: MA Herb Business Manager is a full-stack mobile-first business management application for herbal product distributors. It features Internet Identity authentication with per-user data isolation, a sales cart with FIFO inventory costing, real-time profit tracking, volume points aggregation, purchase order management, and a branded receipt generator with WhatsApp sharing.
features: Internet Identity authentication with per-user data scoping
Dashboard with KPI cards (Monthly Volume Points, Estimated Profit, Inventory Value) and Recharts sales trend chart
Sales cart interface with product search, manual price override, FIFO inventory deduction, and receipt generation
Inventory management with FIFO batch costing and low-stock alerts
Purchase orders that update inventory batches with unit cost
Business Profile with FSSAI number validation (14 digits) and map placeholder
Branded receipt with Print and WhatsApp share functionality
Collapsible sidebar navigation with green and white herbal theme
Mobile-first responsive design using shadcn/ui components
